name: Hamburger Pacific
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Garlic powder or 1 minced garlic clove
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until no trace of pink remains in the meat.
3. Turn off the heat and drain any excess fat.
4. Stir in the mushrooms, cream of tomato soup, and corn with the meat mixture.
5. Empty the cooked noodles into the casserole dish and spread over the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle with paprika for color.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F (175°C) oven for 40 minutes until hot.
8. Serves 8.
